title: Service Layer — Movie API
description:
### Your Task

Build a Movie CRUD API with the 3-layer pattern: Controller → Service → Repository.

### Requirements

- `Movie` entity: `id` (Long), `title` (String), `director` (String), `year` (Integer), `rating` (Double), `genre` (String)
- `MovieRepository` extending `JpaRepository`
- `MovieService` with all CRUD methods
- `MovieController` at `/api/movies`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/movies` → Return all movies (200)
- `GET /api/movies/{id}` → Return movie by ID (200 or 404)
- `POST /api/movies` → Create movie (201)
- `PUT /api/movies/{id}` → Update movie (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/movies/{id}` → Delete movie (204 or 404)

### Key Concepts

- Same 3-layer pattern as Challenge 07
- This should be faster — you've done it before!
hints: Constructor injection in both controller and service
Controller → Service → Repository (never skip the service)
